narrative:
Huber Heights City Sd city school district has 28,078 registered voters, with 60.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.3%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.9 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +0.4% D−R vs -4.4% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
